steps.t: Adan Rhuvyg has asked you to meet him atop the nearby cliffs. The cliffs are north of the town of Lintrev.
Adan Rhuvyg has suggested you enjoy the view from the cliffs of Lintrev.
You should talk to Adan about the view. Adan is atop the cliffs of Lintrev.
Adan has asked you to find materials with which to make a kite. Kite materials can be found throughout Lintrev.
You should bring the kite materials to Adan. Adan is around Lintrev.
